# init(domainIdentifier:)

**Initializer**

Creates a provider manager.

## Declaration

```swift
init(domainIdentifier: String = DefaultContactProviderDomain.identifier) throws
```

## Parameters

- **domainIdentifier**: A string to identify a domain of contacts to provide. Defaults to [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/DefaultContactProviderDomain/identifier].

## Discussion

If needed, the manager registers the [doc://com.apple.ContactProvider/documentation/ContactProvider/DefaultContactProviderDomain] for the extension.
